LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshboundFieldPack.label: forge ashbound field pack
LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshboundFieldPack.description: Assemble a crude abyssal field pack from steel, industrial components and a small residue charge. The result is a low-tier harness for carrying more breach gear without committing to a full armor frame.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftRelayPack.label: forge rift relay pack
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftRelayPack.description: Bind plasteel plates, advanced components and a stabilized residue channel into a rift relay pack. The pattern is stronger and more mobile than the ashbound field pack, but the carrier remains exposed to a faint psychic resonance.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownConduitPack.label: forge crown conduit pack
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownConduitPack.description: Install a crowned core fragment into a sealed back-mounted conduit frame. This is a late armor-support pattern for operators who need to carry dominion-grade equipment without being slowed to a crawl.
